summary: Tested Shift Closing Dialog features for Arabic RTL POS system. All requested features verified working correctly: 1) No-cash button disappears when denomination values entered, 2) Confirm button enabled only when countedCash > 0, 3) Admin can see expected cash field, 4) Backend close endpoint works with denomination data.
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard.js line 3202: calculateCountedCash() === 0 condition correctly wraps no-cash button
Dashboard.js line 3223: Confirm button disabled when calculateCountedCash() === 0
Dashboard.js lines 3101-3106, 3129-3134, 3165-3185: Expected cash and difference fields wrapped with canSee('hide_cash_expected')
Dashboard.js line 115-116: isManagerRole check correctly identifies admin/super_admin/manager roles
shifts_routes.py lines 648-861: cash-register/close endpoint correctly calculates deficit when closing_cash < expected_cash
seed_data_creation: None - used existing shift for 'كاشير تجريبي'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Shift closing dialog features verified working. Current open shift is for 'كاشير تجريبي'. The no-cash button (data-testid='no-cash-btn') disappears when any denomination value > 0 is entered. The confirm button (data-testid='confirm-close-btn') is disabled when countedCash is 0. Admin users can see المتوقع (expected cash) field, cashiers cannot unless they have 'hide_cash_expected' permission.
verified_features: Close register dialog opens with all summary data (Total Sales, Cash, Expenses, Expected)
No-cash button visible when all denominations are 0
No-cash button disappears when any denomination value > 0 entered
Confirm button disabled when countedCash is 0
Admin can see 'الفرق' (difference) field when countedCash > 0
Total count (إجمالي الجرد) updates correctly when denomination values change

mocked_apis.Local Print Agent: localhost:9999 - MOCKED (not available in test environment)
